description.unified: Dispels harmful effects from the ally with the lowest current HP and restores HP 3times, and when healing the target, nearby allies are additionally healed for 40% of the healing amount.

Grants all allies a shield that absorbs damage for [12 sec->4sec]. While the shield is active, Healing Power is increased by [50%->120%] and Status Resistance is increased by 800. [(removed) ATK by 20%, CC immunity]

Deals Magic DMG to the target and nearby enemies 6times, then inflicts Blind for [6 sec->2sec]. This skill is applied with an increased Critical Rate of [500->800]. [(removed) 25% increased All DMG for 10 sec]

Every 20sec, restores [ (added) 14% of Max HP] to the 2 allies with the lowest current HP, and increases their Magic DEF by [???->60*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient))] for [10 sec->15sec]. [(removed) reduces all DMG taken by 15%]

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1 additional Mana Cost->1000], but the target count changes to 2.

dark.unified: Healed allies take 40% less Magic DMG for 10 sec.

light.unified: Increases the target’s Physical DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec. [(removed) 1 additional Mana Cost, DMG increased by 80%]

dark.unified: Increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by 10% for 10 sec. [(removed) Changes the target to random enemies]

light.unified: Activates [Goddess Grace] additionally at the start of every battle. [(removed) Reduces DMG the target takes from Non-Hero enemies by 30%]

dark.unified: Magic DMG taken by Frey is reduced by 20%. [(removed) Number of targets changes to 2]

description.unified: [Blessings of Light] Increases the shield amount by 50% and recovers {0} Mana every sec for 4 sec.
[Heaven’s Vengeance] increases the target’s M.DMG taken by 20% for 10 sec and extends Blind duration by {0} sec.
Every 8 sec, heals the 4 allies with the lowest current HP by {0}% of ATK, and increases the Critical Rate of the 4 allies with the highest ATK by [300->200], and Critical DMG by {1}% for 8 sec.
